## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Branch Type
- [ ] feature/*
- [ ] release/*
- [ ] hotfix/*
- [ ] codex/*

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python scripts\repository_contracts.py`
- [ ] CI green

## Impact
- [ ] Narrative/content only
- [ ] Runtime data changed
- [ ] Workflow / CI / CD changed
- [ ] Tech spec or process changed

## Notes for Reviewers
- Manual GitHub settings required?
- Follow-up work needed?
